Params: {3: 'First, the sound of something slipping from his hands. Then, Evan\'s startled cry, and finally, the man\'s sigh of resignation.'}
{1: 'Evan', 2: 'My arms... I can\'t lift them... Wait! The signal... what about the signal?!'}
{2: 'Evan', 3: 'Wait! The signal... what about the signal?!', 4: '2', 22: '1', 23: '1'}
{3: 'Evan first notices his arms are sore and stiff, then quickly remembers the recent chaos.'}
{3: 'His group had used New Sophiasburgh\'s city gates as bait, successfully boarding the ship and rescuing several Constructs on a critical mission.'}
{3: 'Then, at the designated location, they scrambled desperately with their equipment. But as they arrived, a grim discovery: several devices were damaged in the earlier battle.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'ARU Member A', 3: 'What do we do now?!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'ARU Member B', 3: 'Any of you Babylonians know how to fix this?!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Construct', 3: 'We\'re combat models... though it looks like only the mounts are broken.', 4: '2'}
{2: 'ARU Member B', 3: 'So we can just use them as they are?', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Construct', 3: 'No, we can\'t. These comm units are too sensitive... Is anyone here around two meters tall?', 4: '2'}
{1: 'And immediately, they found out the answer: no.', 3: '45'}
{2: 'And immediately, they found out the answer: no.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Evan', 3: 'Then let\'s stack up! Someone give me a shoulder ride!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'Evan raised his hand eagerly, and the other children followed suit.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Construct', 3: 'It all worked out. We just received word: the frontline operation succeeded. You held out longer than expected, kid.', 4: '2'}
{1: '1', 2: 'ARU Member A', 3: 'Hey, Babylonian, what\'s happening up there?', 4: '3'}
{3: 'A man standing nearby cuts in, pointing up at the sky.'}
{3: 'Following the Constructs\' gaze, Evan looks up and beholds the brightest sky he has ever seen. A green aurora spreads across the clouds like crushed gems scattered between the layers.'}
{3: 'Evan isn\'t sure why he called her name. But as he watches the aurora, he can almost see them—every face, every fighter on that distant battlefield.'}
{3: 'Almost without thought, he takes a step forward, pulled by a sudden, urgent need to know how they are faring.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'ARU Member B', 3: 'Wait... Who are you with, Ursa? Don\'t recognize you.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Ursa', 3: 'Came with the support fleet. I\'m a bionic from another port.', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Ursa', 3: 'My boss knows your situation. Sent me with a team to keep you secure, and to pass on a message:', 4: '1'}
{2: 'Ursa', 3: 'Thank you for your efforts. You are all brave warriors!', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Ursa', 3: 'Whoa, why the tears all of a sudden?', 4: '1'}
{3: 'The Ursa pats the crying man\'s back with a resigned sigh, then instructs the personnel to gather the wounded. Nearby, others pick up rifles and begin to move away from the rescue ships.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Civilian Guard', 3: 'Those brats blew up our Sophiasburgh.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'As they say this, they glance at Evan.'}
{1: '1', 2: 'Civilian Guard', 3: 'So we\'re going to get another one back.', 4: '1'}
{1: '1', 3: 'So they go, turning toward the old Sophiasburgh and not looking back. The Ursa just sighs—a sound of pure resignation—before planting a heavy hand on top of Evan\'s head.'}
{2: 'Ursa', 3: 'You! Get two boats to follow them, and make sure they don\'t get themselves killed!', 4: '4'}
